summary: Testing new features: Notifications, Timeline, Wellness, Postpartum, My Team. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%) after fixing postpartum plan field mismatch bug. Frontend: Screens exist but have routing/display issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Tab bar shows 'Profile' instead of 'My Team' as 5th tab. Layout config has My Team but it's not rendering in tab bar.
Only 2 quick action cards visible (Timeline, Wellness) but requirements specify 4 cards (Timeline, Wellness, Postpartum, My Team). The additional cards row exists but may not be scrollable/visible.

integration_issues.issue: Wellness screen shows 'Emotional Wellness' with basic mood selector instead of 'Wellness Journal' with mood/energy/sleep/symptoms/journal. The wellness.tsx file has correct code but old version seems cached or different file being served.
Known limitation - TouchableOpacity clicks don't work reliably with Playwright. Documented in previous iterations.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix wellness.tsx not being served - verify file is being bundled, restart expo, clear metro cache if needed
CRITICAL: Fix My Team tab not showing in tab bar - check _layout.tsx Tabs.Screen order and ensure href is not null for My Team
HIGH: Verify home.tsx has 4 quick action cards (Timeline, Wellness, Postpartum, My Team) and they're all visible
LOW: Consider updating shadow styles to use boxShadow instead of shadow* props
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Postpartum plan API had field name mismatch - handler used visitor_preferences but frontend sends visitor_policy. Fixed to save all fields from PostpartumPlanCreate model.
Timeline screen renders but milestones list shows 'Week by Week' header with no items - possible rendering issue when due date is past
Authentication cookies not being sent with API requests from frontend - causes 401 errors on protected routes

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Home loads, Timeline/Wellness screens render but with wrong content

seed_data_creation: Used existing test mom from iteration 4
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully working. Frontend has caching/bundling issue - wellness.tsx shows old 'Emotional Wellness' instead of new 'Wellness Journal'. My Team tab not showing in tab bar. May need metro cache clear and restart.

bug_fixed.issue: Postpartum plan PUT endpoint only saved 4 fields (visitor_preferences, feeding_preferences, sleep_boundaries, mental_health_concerns) instead of all fields from PostpartumPlanCreate model
bug_fixed.fix: Updated to save all fields: support_people, meal_prep_plans, recovery_goals, mental_health_resources, baby_feeding_plan, visitor_policy, self_care_activities, warning_signs_to_watch, emergency_contacts, notes
